summary: Iteration 16 verifies the frontend-only fix from review_request: ProfileDrawer now accepts authenticatedUser and falls back to its role/is_admin in isAdmin. End-to-end Playwright run on the preview URL confirms the admin UI materializes for mytaxicloud@gmail.com and stays gated for regular users. Backend regression (4/4 pytest in test_welcome_admin.py) still green.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfileDrawer.js line 56-57 fix is correct — isAdmin now checks both the caos profile record and the authenticatedUser prop (fallback). CaosShell.js line 300 correctly threads authenticatedUser down. Minimal, well-scoped patch.

Longer-term: UserProfileRecord (user_profiles collection) still has role: str | None = None and no is_admin. Recommend backend alignment so /api/caos/profile mirrors admin metadata from the users collection; otherwise any other component that only reads the caos profile will repeat this bug.
No new files were modified by testing. Hot-reload picked up the main agent's changes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — admin chip+toggles PASS, regular chip/no-toggles PASS

test_credentials: Admin: mytaxicloud@gmail.com + seeded bearer/cookie token (seed helper at /app/test_reports/seed_sessions.py). Regular: TEST_regular_<uuid>@example.com with matching seed. Tokens generated fresh per run, cleaned up after.
seed_data_creation: Seeded two sessions via /app/test_reports/seed_sessions.py (admin + regular), cookie injected into Playwright context. Cleaned up 14 sessions and 6 TEST_regular_* users after verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin UI materialization bug that persisted across iterations 14 and 15 is now fully fixed. Verified via Playwright E2E: (1) admin session -> role-chip='Admin', caos-profile-toggle-dev / caos-profile-toggle-multi / caos-profile-console-link all present, Game Mode shows 'Admin access'; (2) regular session -> role-chip='User', the three admin-only testids are absent, Game Mode shows 'Earn tokens to unlock'. /api/auth/me still returns role+is_admin for both personas; /api/health still reports ok:true for all 6 subsystems (mongo, auth, object_storage, emergent_llm_proxy, openai_voice, agent_swarm). Welcome/tour overlay still renders for new sessions (had to dismiss via caos-tour-close during admin run — regression-safe). Continue-as-Guest was not retested here (iteration_15 already PASS) but nothing in this change touched guest-mode code paths.
rca of the issue: Iteration_15's CRITICAL was: ProfileDrawer consumed the caos profile (user_profiles collection) which had no role/is_admin, so the admin-gated UI never rendered even though /api/auth/me had the right data. Main agent applied the minimal frontend fix recommended: (a) ProfileDrawer now takes authenticatedUser prop and its isAdmin computation ORs in authenticatedUser.role==='admin' || authenticatedUser.is_admin===true, (b) CaosShell threads authenticatedUser down. Playwright verification on the live preview confirms the regression is cleared for both admin and regular personas without disturbing the non-admin gating.
